task_description: Implement Phase 7 (Load Testing & Deployment) of NexusQueue: k6 load test scripts, Dockerfiles for all services, production docker-compose, GitHub Actions CI, and comprehensive documentation (ARCHITECTURE.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, README benchmark section).

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds (all 4 workspaces). npm test passes all 92 tests (a pre-existing flaky timing test occasionally fails with 499 vs 500ms but passes on re-run). Docker build skipped due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. No source code was modified - only new files added (k6 scripts, Dockerfiles, CI workflow, documentation).
